---
title: "Rock Paper Scissors"
subtitle: "Frontend"
description: "The Rock Paper Scissors game that can be played entirely in the console."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-08-08
image: ../utils/rock-paper-scissors.png
categories:
  - HTML
  - CSS
  - JavaScript
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://4bdullah7eeshan.github.io/rock-paper-scissors/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/rock-paper-scissors" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>

::: {.callout-note}
Project Description will be added soon.
:::
